## Meeting Purpose

[Sync between Vivek and Sulaman to discuss Looker dashboard updates, data blending, and various client-specific tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/vUAP-idADq1p39q_K2tJoUKyFa-7vzEj?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The GA4 and GSC data blending process is ready for testing, with minor adjustments needed for URL joining](https://fathom.video/share/vUAP-idADq1p39q_K2tJoUKyFa-7vzEj?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Automation for URL formatting (GA4 vs GSC) will be implemented using Apps Script to reduce manual work](https://fathom.video/share/vUAP-idADq1p39q_K2tJoUKyFa-7vzEj?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Several client-specific Looker dashboard issues were reviewed and action items identified](https://fathom.video/share/vUAP-idADq1p39q_K2tJoUKyFa-7vzEj?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [A complex custom build request for Cash App requires further discussion due to missing data fields](https://fathom.video/share/vUAP-idADq1p39q_K2tJoUKyFa-7vzEj?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)

## Topics

### Data Blending and URL Formatting

  - [Current automation script runs in \~10 seconds, capable of full data refresh](https://fathom.video/share/vUAP-idADq1p39q_K2tJoUKyFa-7vzEj?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [Decision made to stick with full updates rather than appending new data](https://fathom.video/share/vUAP-idADq1p39q_K2tJoUKyFa-7vzEj?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [Need to create separate columns for GA4 and GSC URL formats in the Google Sheet](https://fathom.video/share/vUAP-idADq1p39q_K2tJoUKyFa-7vzEj?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [Apps Script will be used to automate URL formatting, reducing manual work](https://fathom.video/share/vUAP-idADq1p39q_K2tJoUKyFa-7vzEj?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Correct URL joining is crucial: GSC blend uses full URL, GA4 blend uses GA4-specific URL](https://fathom.video/share/vUAP-idADq1p39q_K2tJoUKyFa-7vzEj?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)

### Looker Dashboard Testing and Updates

  - [Test copy of Galileo Looker dashboard created to verify data blending](https://fathom.video/share/vUAP-idADq1p39q_K2tJoUKyFa-7vzEj?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [Process: Change data sources to test blends (GA4 and GSC) and verify data accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/vUAP-idADq1p39q_K2tJoUKyFa-7vzEj?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [Only change sources where GA4 or GSC is directly referenced, not for existing blends](https://fathom.video/share/vUAP-idADq1p39q_K2tJoUKyFa-7vzEj?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Some charts (e.g., those already using blends) don't require source changes](https://fathom.video/share/vUAP-idADq1p39q_K2tJoUKyFa-7vzEj?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)

### Client-Specific Issues

  - [Superhuman: Incorrect tag and missing clusters identified; Sulaman to fix](https://fathom.video/share/vUAP-idADq1p39q_K2tJoUKyFa-7vzEj?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [Logic: Straightforward setup, quick review needed](https://fathom.video/share/vUAP-idADq1p39q_K2tJoUKyFa-7vzEj?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [Hockey Stack: Wrong task type (EPD instead of ANA) used; need to inform requester](https://fathom.video/share/vUAP-idADq1p39q_K2tJoUKyFa-7vzEj?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [Relay: Additional GSC-related changes requested](https://fathom.video/share/vUAP-idADq1p39q_K2tJoUKyFa-7vzEj?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Diligent: Issue fixed](https://fathom.video/share/vUAP-idADq1p39q_K2tJoUKyFa-7vzEj?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [SWOT: Discrepancy in URL count explained (published vs receiving traffic)](https://fathom.video/share/vUAP-idADq1p39q_K2tJoUKyFa-7vzEj?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [Cash App: Complex custom build request with missing data fields; requires further discussion](https://fathom.video/share/vUAP-idADq1p39q_K2tJoUKyFa-7vzEj?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)

### Google Algorithm and Data Reporting Issues

  - [Spike drop observed around September 9th due to a Google algorithm update](https://fathom.video/share/vUAP-idADq1p39q_K2tJoUKyFa-7vzEj?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Current bug in Google's reporting causing data to appear stuck a few days behind](https://fathom.video/share/vUAP-idADq1p39q_K2tJoUKyFa-7vzEj?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sulaman to implement URL formatting automation using Apps Script](https://fathom.video/share/vUAP-idADq1p39q_K2tJoUKyFa-7vzEj?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Update and test the copy of Galileo Looker dashboard with correct data blending](https://fathom.video/share/vUAP-idADq1p39q_K2tJoUKyFa-7vzEj?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
  - [Follow up with clients on specific issues (Superhuman, Hockey Stack, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/vUAP-idADq1p39q_K2tJoUKyFa-7vzEj?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
  - [Vivek to review Tavern task and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/vUAP-idADq1p39q_K2tJoUKyFa-7vzEj?tab=summary&timestamp=1601.0)
  - [Discuss Cash App custom build request further due to data field limitations](https://fathom.video/share/vUAP-idADq1p39q_K2tJoUKyFa-7vzEj?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
